name: chrX_Xq28_FLNA_emerin_LCR_tail
description: Most distal Xq28 LCR-rich tail (between MECP2 and PAR2-adjacent region) containing FLNA, EMD, RPL10, MTCP1, BRCC3, plus dispersed SDs of 5-20 kb at 95-99% identity. Recurrent and non-recurrent CNVs in this tail span 0.3-1.0 Mb, often associated with severe X-linked ID, choroideremia-adjacent rearrangements, or FLNA microdeletions.

architecture.internal_structure: Dense cluster of short (5-20 kb) intergenic SDs interleaved with FLNA, EMD, RPL10, MTCP1, BRCC3, IKBKG (NEMO).

related_diseases: IKBKG/NEMO rearrangements (incontinentia pigmenti, X-linked anhidrotic ectodermal dysplasia with immunodeficiency)
